summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The backend addEntry function no longer contains an authentication/authorization check (the diff shows no Runtime.trap for unauthorized caller in addEntry), and the frontend AddEntryPage summary explicitly states it 'allows anyone (authenticated or anonymous) to submit without requiring login.' The constraints are respected: the Login/Logout button remains in the header (AppLayout.tsx still uses useInternetIdentity), and edit/delete controls remain creator-only (EntryDetailPage.tsx still checks authorization).
